name: MWC18-IRF
scope: Engineering survey and topographic mapping for railway applications.
area: United Kingdom (UK) - on or related to the rail route from Manchester via Wigan and Liverpool to Chester.
remarks: Intermediate CRS created in 2022 to assist the emulation of the ETRS89 / MWC18 SnakeGrid projected CRS through transformation ETRS89-GBR [OSNet v2009] to MWC18 (1) (code 10108) used in conjunction with the MWC18-TM map projection (code 10127).
